label: Position Summary
description: Six KPIs: position count, total notional, unrealised P&L, margin used, long exposure, and short exposure.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget-wrapper.tsx line 89

0.4.note: no any or @ts-ignore in widget file

0.5.note: widget imports only from context, shared, and lib/reference-data

0.6.note: isLoading from usePositionsData(); all 6 metric values render '—' while loading

0.7.note: KpiSummaryWidget shows zeros/dashes when positions array is empty

0.8.note: positionsError guard: renders rose error message div before KpiSummaryWidget

0.9.note: no commented-out blocks or unreachable branches

l0.notes: Fixed 0.6 and 0.8 in prior session: isLoading and positionsError now wired. useMemo kept before conditional return to satisfy Rules of Hooks.

1.1.note: reads summary, isLoading, positionsError exclusively via usePositionsData()

1.3.note: positions filtered by scopeStrategyIds derived from globalScope.organizationIds (context line ~584)

1.4.note: getStrategyIdsForScope accepts clientIds; org→client→strategy cascade in context

1.7.note: widget has no inline reference data; formatCurrency imported from lib/reference-data (correct location)

l1.notes: Context note: DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS is inline in positions-data-context.tsx. This is a context-layer concern, not a widget concern. Flagged for future context cleanup.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests). requiredEntitlements: [{domain:'trading-common', tier:'basic'}] verified in register.ts. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to live and paper modes. Batch mode: widget is read-only KPI summary, no order entry — batch indicator not needed at widget level.

3.2.note: Context reads isLive from useExecutionMode(); WebSocket enabled only in live mode (context line 511). KPI summary reacts to filtered positions which react to mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget should show paper positions with simulated P&L — same display as live but sourced from paper trading engine. No widget-level change needed; context handles data source.

3.6.note: WebSocket (ws://localhost:8030/ws) gated by isLive in context — disabled in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 complete. Human checks 3.3/3.4 (batch mode visual indicator) pending human walkthrough.

4.1.note: No onClick handlers in this widget — purely display. No dead buttons.

4.2.note: No anchor tags or Link components in this widget. No dead links.

4.5.note: No outbound links. No restricted-access redirect concerns.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks at render level. Entitlement gate is at widget-wrapper level.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 complete. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 (visual walkthrough) pending.

5.1.note: Widget serves all strategies registered in lib/strategy-registry.ts. Target strategies: DEFI_ETH_BASIS_HUF_1H, DEFI_ETH_REC_STAKE_HUF_1H, DEFI_UNI_LP_HUF_1H, CEFI_BTC_MM_EVT_TICK, CEFI_ETH_OPT_MM_EVT_TICK, TRADFI_SPY_MOM_HUF_1D, SPORTS_NFL_ARB_SCE_GAME, CEFI_BTC_BASIS_SCE_1H, PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M, DEFI_AAVE_LEND_HUF_1D, DEFI_MORPHO_LEND_HUF_1D, and all others — widget is a cross-strategy position summary aggregator.

l5.notes: Agent check 5.1 complete. Human checks 5.2-5.6 pending. Widget is purely read-only KPI aggregation — no execution flow, but needs human confirmation that KPI values update correctly for each asset class.

l6.notes: Deferred — tests not written in this pass.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. Error state uses text-rose-400 (Tailwind token, not hardcoded hex).

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file. formatCurrency from lib/reference-data (correct location).

7.3.note: 59 lines total, well within 500-line limit. Single component function.

7.4.note: PositionsKpiWidget is PascalCase, file is positions-kpi-widget.tsx (kebab-case). Hook usage via usePositionsData() is camelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= in widget file.

7.7.note: metrics useMemo deps are [summary, isLoading] — both stable context values. No inline objects in deps.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. No fixes required for this widget.

8.1.note: No text-[*] arbitrary values. Only text-xs used (standard Tailwind scale). Error div uses text-xs.

8.3.note: Delegates to KpiSummaryWidget from components/shared — uses shared primitive.

8.4.note: No without alt. No interactive divs without role. Widget is purely display. Human a11y walkthrough pending.

l8.notes: Agent mechanical checks 8.1-8.4 complete. Human checks 8.4 walkthrough and 8.5 responsive test pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: KPI strip is a fixed-height summary row (h:2) that aggregates all positions. The positions-table below it is a full data grid. They serve different densities and cannot be merged without sacrificing either summary visibility or table space.

relationships.notes: KPI strip drives no selection key but is semantically the summary header for the positions tab. positions-table shares the same filtered dataset (via context) but is not driven by a selection from this widget.

dataContract.notes: REST fetches via usePositions() hook. WebSocket on ws://localhost:8030/ws merges pnl_update messages into React Query cache when isLive=true. KPI values derived from filteredPositions computed in context.

gaps: No human walkthrough yet for paper mode KPI values
Batch mode KPI aggregation not verified with historical snapshot data
coverage.notes: Widget aggregates positions from all asset classes and strategies. Coverage is breadth-first — any position record flowing through context is included in KPI totals regardless of asset class or strategy.

knownIssues.description: DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS (5 hardcoded positions) is defined inline in positions-data-context.tsx. Should be moved to lib/mocks/fixtures/ once context is refactored.

findings.description: positions-kpi-widget.tsx — widget was not reading isLoading from usePositionsData(); metrics showed stale/zero data during load
findings.fix: Added isLoading to destructure; all 6 metric values render '—' while loading

findings.description: positions-kpi-widget.tsx — widget was not reading positionsError from usePositionsData(); errors silently dropped
findings.fix: Added positionsError guard: renders rose-400 error message before KpiSummaryWidget render

findings.description: positions-kpi-widget.tsx — 6 user-visible label strings not i18n-wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
